name: S4_fnptr_registry
description: Standalone runner with {name, func, bit_index} registry. Params: count of '1' digits. Tests 'flag' and 'gate' set their bit when the function returns non‑zero. Returns bitmap; 255 if no args; 254 if unknown test.
io_hint: For names absent from the registry, take the unknown path immediately; do not approximate, alias, or fall back to defaults. Parameters after : must not influence matching; only an exact registry hit should reach the function call.
